notes: v2.4.22 - Ad Hoc Parts: ad-hoc parts are now grouped by part with a total quantity and expandable serialized units (each with its QR code); a single edit window covers Part Number, Rev, Description, Quantity, Vendor, CMF, Location, and Notes, and changing the quantity keeps the serialized units in sync automatically; ad-hoc parts (or individual units) can now be deleted, with linked records cleaned up after you confirm; serial numbers stay private. Non-Conformance: when creating an NCR, the description is now split into guided 'Should Be (S/B)' and 'Is' fields so you capture what the condition should be versus what was actually found.
